title: Maybe I'm Amazed
meaning_summary: Maybe I'm Amazed still earns because it combines classic-rock familiarity with a personal emotional core that keeps it relevant in both active listening and legacy playlists.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock and songwriter playlists keep the track in steady circulation.
Its long-standing critical and fan reputation strengthens repeat catalog listening.
Publishing-side value improves the economics of a writer-led signature song.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes strong long-tail streaming, recurrent classic-rock usage, and meaningful songwriter-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Legacy label / catalog rights structure assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled from signature-song behavior in a major legacy solo catalog.
